title: Groq LLM Integration - Final Acceptance Report

implementation_summary.objective: Integrate Groq LLM for natural language answer composition in hybrid analytical routes
implementation_summary.fallback: Deterministic composition if LLM fails or returns invalid response
implementation_summary.grounding: SQL facts are authoritative, RAG provides context, no hallucinations allowed

modifications.name: _build_llm_grounding_prompt()
modifications.purpose: Build structured prompt with SQL data, RAG snippets, and strict instructions
key_rules: SQL data presented as authoritative source
Explicit instruction: no invention of data

modifications.name: _validate_llm_answer()
modifications.purpose: Validate LLM response for hallucinations and invalid patterns

modifications.name: _compose_llm_answer()
modifications.purpose: Call Groq LLM with grounded prompt and return validated response
key_features: Returns None on LLM failure, timeout, or validation fail
Fallback mechanism triggered on None return

modifications.name: compose_answer()
changes: Added LLM decision logic before answer composition
Lines 662-666: Check if route supports LLM (HYBRID routes)
Lines 667-668: Call _compose_llm_answer() and use result if valid
Lines 669-695: Indent deterministic fallback into else block
Conditional logic: if llm_answer else deterministic_fallback

llm_route_tests.question: Q4: Quelles bonnes pratiques appliquer avant l'emballage ?
llm_route_tests.note: LLM successfully composed natural language from SQL + RAG context

llm_route_tests.question: Q5: Selon nos données et les bonnes pratiques, comment réduire les pertes ...
llm_route_tests.note: LLM synthesized recommendations from SQL data and agricultural knowledge

llm_route_tests.question: Q6: Analyse uniquement le lot LOT-MANG-001 : perte, efficacité, signal ML ...
llm_route_tests.note: LLM analyzed specific lot with ML signals and SQL metrics

non_llm_routes_verification.question: Q1: Quel est le stock actuel par produit ?
non_llm_routes_verification.note: Deterministic SQL-only response, no LLM needed

non_llm_routes_verification.question: Q8: Et le premier, quelle action recommandes-tu ?
non_llm_routes_verification.note: Recommendation engine route, uses domain logic not LLM

grounding_rules.title: LLM Composition Rules (Non-Negotiable)
rules: 1. SQL FACTS ARE AUTHORITATIVE - Always use SQL data as source of truth
2. RAG IS CONTEXT ONLY - Use agricultural knowledge for context, not facts
3. NO INVENTION - Never create data, lots, or numbers not in SQL/RAG
4. FRENCH LANGUAGE - Respond in French matching manager/operator tone
6. FALLBACK - If LLM fails/empty/invalid, use deterministic composition

checks_performed: Raw RAG headers detection (e.g., 'agronomic knowledge reference')
validation_mechanism.failure_action: Return None to trigger deterministic fallback

error_handling.scenario_1_llm_timeout: Exception caught, logged as warning, returns None, triggers fallback
error_handling.scenario_2_invalid_response: Validation fails, returns None, triggers fallback
error_handling.scenario_3_empty_response: Rejected as <10 chars, returns None, triggers fallback
error_handling.scenario_4_network_error: Exception caught, logged, returns None, triggers fallback
error_handling.result: ✅ 100% resilience - no crashes, always provides answer

acceptance_criteria.criterion_1_llm_integration: ✅ PASS - LLM called for HYBRID routes in compose_answer()
acceptance_criteria.criterion_2_groq_provider: ✅ PASS - Uses get_llm_client() with proper fallback
acceptance_criteria.criterion_3_grounding: ✅ PASS - Prompt built from evidence pack, not free-form
acceptance_criteria.criterion_5_fallback: ✅ PASS - Deterministic composition if LLM fails
acceptance_criteria.criterion_7_routes_correct: ✅ PASS - Only HYBRID routes use LLM
acceptance_criteria.criterion_8_no_regression: ✅ PASS - All 8 test questions execute successfully

after.reason: HYBRID_SQL_RAG, HYBRID_SQL_ML, HYBRID_FULL routes now use LLM

impact_metrics.user_value: Natural language answers for complex questions, not deterministic string formatting

sign_off.component: Groq LLM Integration in Evidence Pipeline
